title: Canopy Growth Corporation (CGC) Analyst Ratings, Estimates & Forecasts
text: Yahoo Finance provides analyst ratings, estimates and forecasts for Canopy Growth. Current analyst consensus: 2 Buy ratings, 2 Hold ratings, 0 Sell ratings = Moderate Buy. Earnings estimates for next quarter: -$0.07 per share. Revenue estimates: Expected growth of 3.56% in the next year. Price target analysis shows average of $1.75 with upside potential of 54.5%. Recent rating changes tracked to monitor analyst sentiment shifts. Earnings revisions history shows trend of analyst estimate changes over recent periods. Valuation metrics compared to industry peers. Growth prospects discussion based on strategic initiatives.
